name: Dutch Oven Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl to form a smooth dough.
2. Roll the dough out on a floured surface until it is about 1/2 inch thick.
3. Using can covers or a suitable doughnut cutter, cut the dough into doughnut shapes. If no doughnut cutters are available, cut into 2-inch squares.
4. Heat cooking oil in a deep skillet or Dutch oven to at least 350°F (175°C).
5. Fry the doughnuts in small batches until they are golden brown on both sides.
6. Drain the fried doughnuts on paper towels.
7. Optionally, roll the hot doughnuts in sugar to finish them.
(Note: The original recipe included additional notes and instructions that were not part of the main cooking process.)
